text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy medieval village there was an extraordinary cat. Our feline hero had the extraordinary ability to open any locked box just by looking at it. You wouldn’t believe the things our cat fetched.

One autumn afternoon, just as the leaves fell in a blur, the village blacksmith noticed a box locked with no key. He’d heard about the cat’s strange abilities. That day, he brought the box to our kitty, who seemed to admire its intricate carved lion head just a bit too much.

With a curious purr, our cat leaped onto a stool. The blacksmith glanced nervously over his spectacles. Every crackle of the fire hummed ominously.

“Come here,” commanded the smithy. His voice trembled a tad.

The cat stalked closer until she landed beside him. He reached into the box and... out fluttered a bundle of shiny feathers. Silence. Just silence. But soon a rustling sound filled the room. This
